summary.summary: Adds support for displaying an active temp target in the Live Activity lock‑screen widget and the related data plumbing. A new TempTargetData struct was added to model temp targets (file:d2f270888ec0) and DataManager gained fetchAndMapTempTarget() to load the latest TempTargetStored row from Core Data (commit:f22bb763fa16fb8c39aa17a1cdeb97e4eac605cb; file:91651a542988). LiveActivityData now publishes a tempTarget and subscribes to Core Data changes for the TempTargetStored entity to reload it (file:35082f2dbacf; commit:f22bb763fa16fb8c39aa17a1cdeb97e4eac605cb). The Activity ContentState was extended with five new fields (isTempTargetActive, tempTargetName, tempTargetDate, tempTargetDuration, tempTargetTarget) and the tempTarget is mapped into the Activity state (file:6a6b254cb4b3; file:7c68602071e2). The UI was updated to render a colored temp target badge in the chart overlay and to draw a chart RuleMark representing the temp target time window and target value (file:a9a8a7baf7b8; file:ab2cc837163f; commit:f22bb763fa16fb8c39aa17a1cdeb97e4eac605cb). The LoopGreen asset/color was added for the temp target styling (file:d4c31f8e41bc). The change also refactors fetching code into a generic fetchAndMapLatest helper and adds a missing CoreData import (commit:9ed9798c8e9049cd2e0113375e81b5b0ef1d0f4e; commit:35d7dff00ebd3f61cf122de1f534c47e670890ce). The project file was updated to include the new source file (file:d25ce3942b7c). Finally, badges were repositioned to the top‑leading (left) overlay and the previous behavior that extended the chart X‑axis two hours into the future for active overrides/temp targets was removed (commit:a4db7f52565346e3eb60f50089826f09d91a58d7).
summary.userFacingImpact: When a temp target is active, the Live Activity lock‑screen widget will show a colored temp target badge with the target name and draw the temp target region on the chart; this badge stacks with the existing override badge if both are active (file:a9a8a7baf7b8; file:ab2cc837163f; commit:f22bb763fa16fb8c39aa17a1cdeb97e4eac605cb). Badges were moved to the left side of the chart and the chart end no longer extends two hours into the future when an override or temp target is active (commit:a4db7f52565346e3eb60f50089826f09d91a58d7).
